SEARCH
Package org.openapitools.codegen.meta

Class FeatureSet.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder
Enclosing class:
FeatureSet
public static final class FeatureSet.Builder extends Object
FeatureSet builder static inner class.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FeatureSet
    build()
    Returns a FeatureSet built from the parameters previously set.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    clientModificationFeatures(EnumSet<ClientModificationFeature> clientModificationFeatures)
    Sets the clientModificationFeatures and returns a reference to this Builder so that the methods can be chained together.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    dataTypeFeatures(EnumSet<DataTypeFeature> dataTypeFeatures)
    Sets the dataTypeFeatures and returns a reference to this Builder so that the methods can be chained together.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    documentationFeatures(EnumSet<DocumentationFeature> documentationFeatures)
    Sets the documentationFeature and returns a reference to this Builder so that the methods can be chained together.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    excludeClientModificationFeatures(ClientModificationFeature... clientModificationFeature)
    Excludes the defined ClientModificationFeature from the set of supported features.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    excludeDataTypeFeatures(DataTypeFeature... dataTypeFeature)
    Excludes the defined DataTypeFeature from the set of supported features.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    excludeDocumentationFeatures(DocumentationFeature... documentationFeature)
    Excludes the defined DocumentationFeature from the set of supported features.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    excludeGlobalFeatures(GlobalFeature... globalFeature)
    Excludes the defined GlobalFeature from the set of supported features.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    excludeParameterFeatures(ParameterFeature... parameterFeature)
    Excludes the defined ParameterFeature from the set of supported features.
    FeatureSet.Builder

    Excludes the defined SchemaSupportFeature from the set of supported features.

    Excludes the defined SecurityFeature from the set of supported features.

    Excludes the defined WireFormatFeature from the set of supported features.

    Sets the globalFeatures and return a reference to this Builder so that the methods can be chained together.

    Includes the defined ClientModificationFeature to the new/existing set of supported features.

  • Method Details

    • clientModificationFeatures

      public FeatureSet.Builder clientModificationFeatures(EnumSet<ClientModificationFeature> clientModificationFeatures)
      Sets the clientModificationFeatures and returns a reference to this Builder so that the methods can be chained together.
      Parameters:
      clientModificationFeatures - the clientModificationFeatures to set
      Returns:
      a reference to this Builder

    • includeClientModificationFeatures

      public FeatureSet.Builder includeClientModificationFeatures(ClientModificationFeature... clientModificationFeature)
      Includes the defined ClientModificationFeature to the new/existing set of supported features.
      Parameters:
      clientModificationFeature - One or more clientModificationFeature to ensure are included in the set.
      Returns:
      a reference to this Builder

    • excludeClientModificationFeatures

      public FeatureSet.Builder excludeClientModificationFeatures(ClientModificationFeature... clientModificationFeature)
      Excludes the defined ClientModificationFeature from the set of supported features.
      Parameters:
      clientModificationFeature - One or more clientModificationFeature to ensure are excluded from the set.
      Returns:
      a reference to this Builder

    • dataTypeFeatures

      public FeatureSet.Builder dataTypeFeatures(EnumSet<DataTypeFeature> dataTypeFeatures)
      Sets the dataTypeFeatures and returns a reference to this Builder so that the methods can be chained together.
      Parameters:
      dataTypeFeatures - the dataTypeFeatures to set
      Returns:
      a reference to this Builder

    • includeDataTypeFeatures

      public FeatureSet.Builder includeDataTypeFeatures(DataTypeFeature... dataTypeFeature)
      Includes the defined DataTypeFeature to the new/existing set of supported features.
      Parameters:
      dataTypeFeature - One or more dataTypeFeature to ensure are included in the set.
      Returns:
      a reference to this Builder

      public FeatureSet.Builder excludeDataTypeFeatures(DataTypeFeature... dataTypeFeature)
      Excludes the defined DataTypeFeature from the set of supported features.
      Parameters:
      dataTypeFeature - One or more dataTypeFeature to ensure are excluded from the set.
      Returns:
      a reference to this Builder

      Returns:
      a reference to this Builder

      public FeatureSet.Builder excludeSecurityFeatures(SecurityFeature... securityFeature)
      Excludes the defined SecurityFeature from the set of supported features.

      Returns:

      Returns:

      public FeatureSet.Builder excludeGlobalFeatures(GlobalFeature... globalFeature)
      Excludes the defined GlobalFeature from the set of supported features.
      Parameters:
      globalFeature - One or more globalFeatures to ensure are excluded from the set.
      Returns:
      a reference to this Builder

    • wireFormatFeatures

      public FeatureSet.Builder wireFormatFeatures(EnumSet<WireFormatFeature> wireFormatFeatures)
      Sets the wireFormatFeatures and return a reference to this Builder so that the methods can be chained together.
      Parameters:
      wireFormatFeatures - the wireFormatFeatures to set
      Returns:
      a reference to this Builder

    • includeWireFormatFeatures

      public FeatureSet.Builder includeWireFormatFeatures(WireFormatFeature... wireFormatFeature)
      Includes the defined WireFormatFeature to the new/existing set of supported features.
      Parameters:
      wireFormatFeature - One or more wireFormatFeatures to ensure are included in the set.
      Returns:
      a reference to this Builder

    • excludeWireFormatFeatures

      public FeatureSet.Builder excludeWireFormatFeatures(WireFormatFeature... wireFormatFeature)
      Excludes the defined WireFormatFeature from the set of supported features.

      This option should only be used if something is overtly broken or not possible in a generator. Please log a warning if invoking this method.

      Parameters:
      wireFormatFeature - One or more wireFormatFeatures to ensure are excluded from the set.
      Returns:
      a reference to this Builder

    • build

      public FeatureSet build()
      Returns a FeatureSet built from the parameters previously set.
      Returns:
      a FeatureSet built with parameters of this FeatureSet.Builder
